Network access isolated to the single ESLint-excepted medline-source.ts with assertAllowed first; CI fully offline via injected FetchLike + committed fixture; abstain-unless-supported and fail-closed guarantees structurally proven (no uncited-claim escape hatch, 3 fail-closed layers); literature-retrieval does not enable cloud-inference (local Ollama via provider-agnostic LLMClient, no cloud fallback). 2393 tests pass, no regressions, commit 553f087 touches only 8 src/medical files.
